case_title: PATRICK O''DONNELL VS. PAUL GERARD MARTIN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'DONNELL, PATRICK TRUSTEE OF THE PATRICK O'DONNELL REVOCABLE TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIN, PAUL GERARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1501 LEAVENWORTH STREET, #20, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
